title: Valentines From A Hyperbolist
content:
Take all the love that e'er was told
         Since first the world began,
     Increase it twenty thousand-fold
         (If mathematics can),
     Add all the love the world shall see
         Till Gabriel's final call,
     And when compared with mine 'twill be
         Infinitesimal.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Arthur Macy delivers a powerful performance in "Valentines From A Hyperbolist"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
